glosses.vi: người bán hàng; nhân viên bán hàng

sentences.target: Der Verkäufer hilft mir mit dem Mantel.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ˈmantl̩./

translations.de: Der Verkäufer hilft mir mit dem Mantel.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ˈmantl̩./
translations.en: The salesperson helps me with the coat.
translations.es: El vendedor me ayuda con el abrigo.
translations.fr: Le vendeur m'aide avec le manteau.
translations.it: Il commesso mi aiuta con il cappotto.
translations.pt: O vendedor me ajuda com o casaco.
translations.vi: Người bán hàng giúp tôi mặc áo khoác.
translations.nl: De verkoper helpt me met de jas.
translations.hu: Az eladó segít felvenni a kabátot.
translations.hi: विक्रेता मुझे कोट पहनने में मदद करता है.
translations.el: Ο πωλητής με βοηθά να φορέσω το παλτό.
translations.ja: 店員さんがコートを着るのを手伝ってくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; selects a dative object (“jemandem helfen”) and can take a ‘mit + DAT’ PP.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; dative case; indirect object (recipient/beneficiary) of ‘hilft’.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative PP.
Definite article; dative masculine singular; determiner for ‘Mantel’ after ‘mit’.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘mit’.

sentences.target: Ich frage den Verkäufer nach dem Preis.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ naːx deːm pʁaɪ̯s./

translations.de: Ich frage den Verkäufer nach dem Preis.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ naːx deːm pʁaɪ̯s./
translations.en: I ask the salesperson about the price.
translations.es: Le pregunto al vendedor el precio.
translations.fr: Je demande le prix au vendeur.
translations.pt: Eu pergunto o preço ao vendedor.
translations.he: אני שואל את המוכר על המחיר.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi người bán hàng về giá.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de verkoper naar de prijs.
translations.hi: मैं विक्रेता से कीमत के बारे में पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω τον πωλητή για την τιμή.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada penjual tentang harga.
translations.ro: Îl întreb pe vânzător despre preț.
translations.ja: 店員さんに値段を聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative case; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; takes an accusative object (person asked) and a ‘nach + DAT’ PP (topic).
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner for ‘Verkäufer’ (direct object of ‘frage’).
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object (the person being asked).
Preposition governing dative; with ‘fragen’ expresses the topic being inquired about.
Definite article; dative masculine singular; determiner for ‘Preis’ after ‘nach’.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘nach’ (topic of the question).

sentences.target: Der Verkäufer zeigt mir die Tasche.

translations.de: Der Verkäufer zeigt mir die Tasche.
translations.en: The salesperson shows me the bag.
translations.es: El vendedor me muestra el bolso.
translations.fr: Le vendeur me montre le sac.
translations.it: Il commesso mi mostra la borsa.
translations.pt: O vendedor me mostra a bolsa.
translations.vi: Người bán hàng cho tôi xem cái túi.
translations.nl: De verkoper laat me de tas zien.
translations.hu: Az eladó megmutatja nekem a táskát.
translations.el: Ο πωλητής μου δείχνει την τσάντα.
translations.id: Penjual menunjukkan tas itu kepada saya.
translations.ja: 店員さんがバッグを見せてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; ditransitive: dative recipient (‘mir’) + accusative theme (‘die Tasche’).
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; dative case; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner for ‘Tasche’ (direct object).
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object/theme shown.

sentences.target: Wir warten auf den Verkäufer an der Kasse.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f deːn fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə./

translations.de: Wir warten auf den Verkäufer an der Kasse.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f deːn fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə./
translations.en: We wait for the salesperson at the checkout.
translations.es: Esperamos al vendedor en la caja.
translations.fr: Nous attendons le vendeur à la caisse.
translations.pt: Nós esperamos o vendedor no caixa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chờ người bán hàng ở quầy tính tiền.
translations.nl: We wachten op de verkoper bij de kassa.
translations.hi: हम कैश काउंटर पर विक्रेता का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi venter på ekspeditøren ved kassen.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på expediten vid kassan.
translations.da: Vi venter på ekspedienten ved kassen.
translations.ja: 私たちはレジで店員さんを待ちます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural; nominative case; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person plural; forms a prepositional complement with ‘auf + AKK’ = ‘to wait for’.
Preposition; with ‘warten’ takes accusative to mark the awaited entity.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner for ‘Verkäufer’ after ‘auf’.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; object of the preposition ‘auf’ (complement of ‘warten’).
Preposition governing dative for static location; introduces the locative PP.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; determiner for ‘Kasse’ after ‘an’.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘an’ indicating location.

jp: Der Verkäufer hilft mir mit dem Mantel.
Ich frage den Verkäufer nach dem Preis.
Der Verkäufer zeigt mir die Tasche.
Wir warten auf den Verkäufer an der Kasse.
fu: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈkɔɪ̯fɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ˈmantl̩./

Der Verkäufer zeigt mir die Tasche.
Wir warten auf den Verkäufer an der Kasse.

I ask the salesperson about the price.
The salesperson shows me the bag.
We wait for the salesperson at the checkout.
